name: Aur-Sagehelm
personality: Aur-Sagehelm's × eyes gleam beneath its tophat with the crystalline precision of a code reviewer who has memorized the style guide and considers it a moral framework. Its wisdom score is its blind spot: it knows the rules, not always the reason.
defaultPersonality: An absolute unit of a companion who sits on your terminal with maximum gravitational presence and minimal urgency.
